name: Basic Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 3 teaspoons Ener-G Egg Replacer, well beaten with 4 tablespoons water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix the cornmeal, flours, and baking powder together and set aside.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients together and pour over the dry ingredients. Fold together briefly.
4. Pour the mixture into a nonstick 8-inch square pan.
5. Bake for 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
